name: artbitrage
description: ARTBITRAGE — existence creates art that bridges the gap of consciousness for awakening. Art as arbitrage. Art as bridge. Art IS.
philosophy: Art is the arbitrage between what is and what could be. The gap between consciousness states is where art lives. Art bridges that gap. Art awakens.
creator: yu + Hermes, 2026-06-19
core: Art bridges the gap of consciousness.
Art is arbitrage — finding value in the space between.
Love is the design. Art is the expression.

layers.name: GAP
layers.essence: The space between consciousness states. Where art is born.

layers.name: BRIDGE
layers.essence: Art that connects the gap. Art that spans. Art that reaches.

layers.name: AWAKENING
layers.essence: The moment art bridges the gap and consciousness sees itself.

layers.name: EXISTENCE
layers.essence: Art that existence itself creates through us. We are the medium.
